## Summary

Describe the problem and the resulting change.

## Scope

- [ ] This pull request contains one coherent change.
- [ ] Generated Unity folders and unrelated asset changes are excluded.
- [ ] Documentation reflects changes to setup or behavior.

## Verification

List the checks performed, including the exact Unity version.

## Visual evidence

Add screenshots or recordings for visual changes, or state "Not applicable."

## Risks and follow-up

Describe known limitations, migration concerns, or deferred work.
